conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The email must include the phrase "customer support" at least once.
new_constraint: The keyword "support" must not appear in the response.
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The email must include the phrase "customer support" at least once. The keyword "support" must not appear in the response.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Recent Transaction - Account [Your Account Number]

Dear [Bank Name] Team,

I am writing to request clarification regarding a recent transaction on my account, [Your Account Number].

The transaction in question is for the amount of [Amount of Transaction] and it was posted on [Date of Transaction]. The description provided is [Transaction Description, if any], and I do not immediately recognize this charge.

Could you please provide more detailed information about this specific transaction, including the merchant name or the nature of the transaction?

If you need any further information from my end to investigate this, please let me know. I would appreciate assistance from your customer support team in resolving this matter promptly.

Thank you for your time and attention to this issue. I look forward to your reply.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
